candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=90%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the signal is structurally unreliable and should be sized to zero regardless of conviction strength.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze, log as UNRELIABLE
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
